channel.title: samsungmobile — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by samsungmobile (samsungmobile).

item.title: CVE-2026-21057 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Samsung Pass prior to version 5.2.10.3 allows local privileged attackers to write out-of-bounds memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-21056 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in Samsung Health prior to version 7.00.0.107 allows local attackers to access connected device information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21055 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: Improper export of android application components in Bixby prior to version 4.0.70.8 allows local attackers to execute arbitrary commands with Bixby privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21054 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in InputSharing prior to version 2.7.01.4 allows local attackers to access sharing data.

item.title: CVE-2026-21053 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Samsung Email prior to version 6.2.13.1 allows local attackers to create arbitrary files within the application sandbox.

item.title: CVE-2026-21052 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal in SemClipboardService prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to access files with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21051 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect default permissions in WLAN security prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to configure TencentWifiSecurity settings.

item.title: CVE-2026-21050 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in SmartThingsKit prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21049 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in libpadm.so library prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-21048 · 8.4 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in parsing DNG format in libimagecodec.media.quram.so prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows remote attackers to write out-of-bounds memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-21046 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Time-of-check time-of-use race condition in fabricKeymaster trustlet prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-21045 · 8.4 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in parsing TIFF format in libimagecodec.media.quram.so prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows remote attackers to write out-of-bounds memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-21044 · 5.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in KnoxGuardManager prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to bypass the persistence configuration of the application.

item.title: CVE-2026-21043 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal in Wallpaper service prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to access files with system server privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21042 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in libsavsac.so prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-21041 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in SamsungSEAgentService prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21040 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in IAFDService prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to use the privileged APIs.

item.title: CVE-2026-21039 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in Settings prior to SMR Jul-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to configure Theft protection settings.

item.title: CVE-2026-21038 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Samsung Android USB Driver for Windows prior to version 1.9.5.0 allows local attacker to access out-of-bounds memory.

item.title: CVE-2026-21037 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Samsung Members prior to version 5.8.01.5 allows local attackers to access arbitrary URL and launch arbitrary activity with Samsung Members privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21036 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in Samsung Internet prior to version 30.0.0.39 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21035 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Improper input validation in Samsung Plus TV prior to version 1.0.28.6 allows remote attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21034 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in Samsung Auto prior to version 3.1.2.61 in Android 15 and 3.2.0.38 in Android 16 allows local attacker to change audio configuration.

item.title: CVE-2026-21033 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in ExpressHomeWidgetReceiver of Samsung Assistant prior to version 9.3.14 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary script.

item.title: CVE-2026-21032 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in SmartHomeWidgetReceiver of Samsung Assistant prior to version 9.3.14 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary script.

item.title: CVE-2026-21031 · 5.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in AppBlock prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to launch arbitrary activity. User interaction is required for triggering this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-21030 · 6.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in MediaTek Audio HAL prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21029 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in Galaxy Editing Service prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to execute privileged operations.

item.title: CVE-2026-21028 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in AuditLogService prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21027 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in ImsSettings prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to trigger logging function.

item.title: CVE-2026-21026 · 6.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in SpriteWallpaper prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access to sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21025 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect privilege assignment in Telephony prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21017 · 4.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper handling of insufficient privileges in SecTelephonyProvider prior to SMR Jun-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access privileged files.

item.title: CVE-2026-21024 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper privilege management in Samsung System Support Service prior to version 8.0.8.0 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21022 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper handling of insufficient permissions in Routines prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21021 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Routines prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to launch privileged activity.

item.title: CVE-2026-21020 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper export of android application components in OmaCP prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21019 · 8.9 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation in FacAtFunction in Galaxy Watch prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21018 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds write in SveService prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-21016 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect privilege assignment in LocationManager prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21015 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect default permissions in FactoryCamera prior to SMR May-2026 Release 1 allows local attacker to access unique identifier.

item.title: CVE-2026-21023 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Insufficient verification of data authenticity in PackageManagerService prior to SMR Mar-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to modify the installation restriction of specific application.

item.title: CVE-2026-21010 · 6.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation in Retail Mode prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows local attackers to trigger privileged functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-21008 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information in S Share prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows adjacent attacker to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21014 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in Samsung Camera prior to version 16.5.00.28 allows local attacker to access location data. User interaction is required for triggering this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-21013 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect default permission in Galaxy Wearable prior to version 2.2.68.26 allows local attackers to access sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2026-21012 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: External control of file name in AODManager prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows privileged local attacker to create file with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2026-21011 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect privilege assignment in Bluetooth in Maintenance mode prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass Extend Unlock.

item.title: CVE-2026-21009 · 4.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper check for exceptional conditions in Recents prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attacker to bypass App Pinning.

item.title: CVE-2026-21007 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper check for exceptional conditions in Device Care prior to SMR Apr-2026 Release 1 allows physical attackers to bypass Knox Guard.
